member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.DI.IDependencyContainer
member.summary: Dependency injection container interface for registering and resolving services.

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.DI.IHostedService
member.summary: Services that implement this interface will have their method called when the DI container is initialized (on game start). This allows them to perform any necessary setup at the appropriate time, such as registering event handlers. The service will be disposed when the game shuts down, allowing for any necessary cleanup.

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.DI.IHostedService.OnScopeStart
member.summary: Called when the DI container is initialized (on game start). This allows the service to perform any necessary setup at the appropriate time, such as registering event handlers.

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.ECS.Worlds.Store.ComponentIndex``2
member.summary:
Returns the index for indexed components to search entities with a specific component value in O(1).
Executes in O(1).

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.ECS.Worlds.Store.LinkComponentIndex``1
member.summary:
Returns the index for link components to search entities with a specific entity in O(1).
Executes in O(1).

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.Idents.AreaId
member.summary: Identifies an area within the game world. Areas can be main Chapter maps, sub-areas such as the Zodiac Village, or hidden boss arenas. If going somewhere requires a loading screen, it's probably a different area.
member.param: The underlying ID value. This is not guaranteed to be stable across game versions, and should not be used for anything other than debugging or logging purposes.

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.Idents.AreaId.#ctor(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Identifies an area within the game world. Areas can be main Chapter maps, sub-areas such as the Zodiac Village, or hidden boss arenas. If going somewhere requires a loading screen, it's probably a different area.
member.param: The underlying ID value. This is not guaranteed to be stable across game versions, and should not be used for anything other than debugging or logging purposes.

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId
member.summary: A unique identifier for a player in the current session. This is not a persistent identifier and can change over time, especially if players disconnect and reconnect. It should be used for identifying players during the current session, but not for long-term storage or cross-session identification.

member.name: P:ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId.Server
member.summary: The PlayerId representing the server itself. This can be used to identify actions or messages that originate from the server rather than any specific player.

member.name: P:ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId.Invalid
member.summary: An invalid PlayerId, which can be used to represent the absence of a player or an uninitialized state.

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.Serialization.SerializableMode
member.summary: Defines how a struct should be serialized when using .
